reasoning: The primary limiter for you is the 9.3% power drop-off from 5-minute to 20-minute efforts, indicating poor lactate clearance. After an extended rest, we'll start with reduced intensity to transition back into your routine. These intervals will specifically prepare you for the demands of the Alpine Loop, especially the long climb segments like Sundance to Cascade Springs.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x 12-minute sets: 2 minutes at 242W followed by 4 minutes at 218W, repeated twice per set. 4-minute rest between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
